copy: Nueva Andalucía Suites is positioned for buyers who want a practical Marbella-area base: golf, restaurants, Puerto Banús and lock-and-leave ownership in one clear address logic.
The project is less about spectacle and more about convenience, demand depth and a refined residence format that works for international use.
metrics: Golf, amenities and Puerto Banús proximity

why.copy: The project suits buyers who value location utility: golf access, restaurants, international demand and a low-maintenance residence profile close to Puerto Banús.

A smaller, easier ownership profile in a high-demand Marbella micro-location.
Nueva Andalucía combines golf, amenities, international rental depth and Puerto Banús access.

copy: The design direction is efficient and refined, prioritising simple layouts, modern finishes and practical outdoor connections.
It is shaped for buyers who want the Marbella lifestyle base to be easy, polished and low-friction.
